meaning: n.杞昏攽,浠ラ珮鍌茬殑鎬佸害瀵瑰緟vt.钄戣,閯欏純
examples: Janet looked at him with disdain.
Koons has engrossed himself in a world of commercialism that most modern artists disdain.
After three years she decided, much to her family's disdain, to study design in New York.
Even my friends who disdain golf admitted to watching the back nine on Sunday.
